experiences.company: Roman Catholic Archdiocese of Singapore, Digital Chuch Office
description: Architected and implemented Singpass (Login and MyInfo) across Mobile and Web, ensuring a secure and reliable system from the ground up.
Overcame major security and legacy dependency challenges, modernizing an existing codebase and delivering a seamless login and data verification experience.
Oversaw the feature end-to-end, now serving 300,000+ users, reducing login errors, and enabling parishes to provide more accurate pastoral services through verified user data.
Improved the onboarding documentation that reduced the onboarding time from a week to just a few hours.
Maintained and improved a mileage database in MS Access by ensuring that exporting the data to Excel was bug-free to ensure a smooth process when claiming licenses and bonuses.
